title: Numbers on Plugsuits
wikitext:
[]: Numbers on Plugsuits             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Aug 08, 2012 5:07 am Listening to the short conversation between Mari and Kaji in the very beginning of 2.0 gave me some new ideas. Kaji says that "the new plugsuit wasn't provided on time" and that he is "sorry about sending [Mari] into combat in the provisional unit on such short notice." Since the plugsuit Mari wears to pilot Unit-05 is specially designed for forced synchronization, I'm guessing that the "new plugsuit" Kaji mentions (the pink one we see later on) was intended for use with a different Evangelion. What I'm thinking now is that there was a "true" Evangelion being constructed within Bethany Base for Mari's use, i.e. Unit-07. Since Unit-05 was the only one ready to sortie at the time of Tunniel's release, Mari was forced to use that instead of her "personal unit." Since the destruction of Unit-05 was one of Kaji's goals, he probably let Tunniel of the chain at that time specifically to force the usage of Unit-05. And as for the reason behind Mari piloting Unit-02 against Zeruel instead of Unit-07, it could be any number of things. Her plugsuit was ready, but perhaps Unit-07 wasn't, or it couldn't be transported from Bethany Base to Tokyo-III in time. I can already see a few weak points in this idea as I'm typing it, so feel free to turn it into Swiss cheese.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Wed Aug 08, 2012 6:30 am One small problem; Mari's pink plugsuit has a '5' on the back. I'm too lazy to source an image but... Yeah. Swiss cheese.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Aug 08, 2012 6:38 am That may be simply to denote her title of "Fifth Children," if that's what she is. In that case, Kaworu would be the Fourth Children in Rebuild, and the others are the same.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Aug 08, 2012 7:24 am It has been discussed before, and I recall the sensible interpretation is that the numbers on the back of the plugsuits are for their designated Evangelion unit: Rei's has 00, Shinji's has 01, Asuka's has 02 (including the test suit), and Mari's is 05. As to why Mari's new suit says 05 after whatever happened to Unit-05 (I admit I forget how it met its demise) ... I'd retaining the '05' was an artistic choice to avoid confusing the audience. Following on, I have no idea if the plug suit was made for the sole purpose of having her to wear as she 'borrowed' Unit-02. I guess we'll have to see if she uses the pink suit again in the upcoming films.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 08, 2012 7:30 am Could be that, along the lines of what Kaji's line implies, the equipment that wasn't ready on time really was the pink plugsuit, and it would have been intrinsically compatible with Eva-05 by virtue of being a 'new-type' plugsuit.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Aug 08, 2012 8:15 am Yeah, I don't know what I was thinking in my reply. It only dawned on me in the shower that the other Children have their designated Eva Unit's number printed on their plug suits. Derp on my part. Yeah what Reichu said makes sense. But it still sounds to me like, given enough time, using the Provisional Unit would not have been their only option in that situation.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon Aug 13, 2012 8:45 am Just for reference, I stumbled upon a pic:

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Aug 13, 2012 3:42 pm Does Kaworu have a 06 on there? I never really payed attention up until now. And as I try to gather a picture in my head, I can't really see where a 6 would go.

[]:             Quote Post by Joe » Mon Aug 13, 2012 3:51 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Does Kaworu have a 06 on there? I never really payed attention up until now. And as I try to gather a picture in my head, I can't really see where a 6 would go.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Aug 13, 2012 10:25 pm The most feasible choice is that it is an Eva-based numeration... Since by "children" Rei is not "zero child" and Asuka's 02 test suit was only 'cuz she wasn't the designated pilot of either units 02 nor 03... Also, Mari's 05 suit (the pink one) could just have been the actual Eva 05 suit and the one she actually uses on Eva 05 was also provisional... I guess she just kept the pink suit with the already printed "05", we don't know if the suits have a pre-defined color of if the pilot can customize it... For many purposes, Rei and Shinji don't care, so NERV just makes their suits white and blue with white; since Asuke likes red, she asks for them to be red (even the test one is that color) and Mari likes it pink... Why are we discussing such a trivial matter!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 14, 2012 1:21 am arael wrote: Why are we discussing such a trivial matter!

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Aug 14, 2012 4:53 am arael wrote: Why are we discussing such a trivial matter!

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Tue Aug 14, 2012 7:26 am arael wrote: Why are we discussing such a trivial matter!
